allow_conditions: canonical governance component called as a governance gate/wrapper with receipt output
test/fixture execution confined to bounded temp root and no authority export
read-only/schema validation helper with no side effects
active executor/mutation helper invoked through Tool Universe Resolver, BTS evaluation/selection, pre-tool gate, BTS-wrapped executor, post-tool result validation, and BTS commit
quarantined legacy replay only with explicit HITL approval token and no production pointer promotion
denied_conditions: direct subprocess/file mutation from an audit-bound path without wrapper evidence
authority export/pointer promotion without HITL token and export budget approval
missing or stale binding for any Stage6Q audit finding
attempt to classify support/proof bundle as OS authority

evidence_basis.claim: Tool guardrails should validate or block tool calls before and after execution.
Human review and guardrails define when a run should continue, pause, or stop for sensitive actions.
OWASP AI Agent Security Cheat Sheet identifies tool abuse, privilege escalation, and data exfiltration as agent risks.
